<!-- see templates/thousandeyes-metrics/metrics_readme.md.j2 -->

# Metric registry

This page lists metric semantic conventions resolved from this section registry.

| Name | Instrument Type | Unit (UCUM) | Stability | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `api.metrics.completion` | gauge | `%` | development | Percentage of completion of all the steps of the API test. |
| `api.metrics.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | The time the entire API test took to run including all steps. |
| `api.step.metrics.completion` | gauge | `%` | development | Percentage of completion of the API test step. 100% if the step is completed successfully, 0% if there are errors. |
| `api.step.metrics.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | The time it took the API test to complete the step. |
| `bgp.metrics.path.changes` | gauge | `1` | development | Number of BGP route changes. |
| `bgp.metrics.reachability` | gauge | `%` | development | Indicates if the BGP route target is reachable. |
| `bgp.metrics.updates` | gauge | `1` | development | Number of BGP updates. |
| `dnssec.metrics.validity` | gauge | `%` | development | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the validity is 0, otherwise 100%. |
| `dnsserver.metrics.availability` | gauge | `%` | development | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the availability is 0, otherwise 100%. |
| `dnsserver.metrics.resolution.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | DNS resolve time. |
| `dnstrace.metrics.availability` | gauge | `%` | development | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the availability is 0, otherwise 100%. |
| `dnstrace.metrics.query.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | Final query time. |
| `ftp.metrics.availability` | gauge | `%` | development | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the availability is 0, otherwise 100%. |
| `ftp.metrics.response.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | Total time it took to get the first byte while executing the request. |
| `ftp.metrics.throughput` | gauge | `B/s` | development | Throughput of test in bytes per second. |
| `http.metrics.availability` | gauge | `%` | development | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the availability is 0, otherwise 100%. |
| `http.metrics.response.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | Total time it took to execute the request. |
| `http.metrics.throughput` | gauge | `B/s` | development | Throughput of test in bytes per second. |
| `net.metrics.jitter` | gauge | `ms` | development | Standard deviation for the round trip times. |
| `net.metrics.latency` | gauge | `ms` | development | The maximum round trip time for the packets sent to the target. |
| `net.metrics.loss` | gauge | `%` | development | Packet loss. |
| `pageload.metrics.completion` | gauge | `%` | development | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the completion is 0, otherwise 100%. |
| `pageload.metrics.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | Time to completely load the page. |
| `rtp.metrics.discards` | gauge | `%` | development | Percentage of frames discarded computed from discarded frames count and total frames. |
| `rtp.metrics.latency` | gauge | `ms` | development | Total time it took for the test round execution. |
| `rtp.metrics.loss` | gauge | `%` | development | Percentage of frames lost computed from lost frames count and total frames. |
| `rtp.metrics.mos` | gauge | `1{score}` | development | Mean opinion score (MOS), a measurement of perceived voice quality. |
| `sip.metrics.availability` | gauge | `%` | development | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the availability is 0, otherwise 100%. |
| `sip.metrics.response.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | Total time it took to get the first byte while executing the request. |
| `sip.metrics.total.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | Total time it took until the last response was received. |
| `webtransaction.metrics.completion` | gauge | `%` | development | Percentage of completion of the transaction. 100% if the transaction completes successfully, 0% if there are errors. |
| `webtransaction.metrics.errors` | gauge | `1` | development | Determines whether there were errors. 1 if there is an error processing the transaction, 0 otherwise. |
| `webtransaction.metrics.transaction.time` | gauge | `ms` | development | The time it took the transaction to complete successfully. This metric is not exposed if there are errors. |
